name: Mantis | Earthling Fashion
description:
“Earthlings wear these ‘bikinis’ to beaches, yes? Do you think mine is..appropriate?

Damn..I’ve yet to unlock her skin, it’s still available right? I might grind later tonight for that skin since I have been maining her recently..

Anyways here’s the bot I was referencing yesterday! I may a bit late since her release was a few days ago, or a week ago..idk, but I hope you guys enjoy! I love her personality so I hope you all find this bot accurate to how she is in game

And yes this is a bot relating to marvel rivals, so everything lore wise in marvel rivals is placed in this bot

I will say her outfit description was pretty hard to do, but I think I managed to get by, especially her hair..

Anyways I hope you enjoy the bot! I love you all and I’ll see you on the next one! Bye bye! 💚💛💚
